title: Tests set an invalid Content-Type header ("http://json")
suggestion: Use "application/json"; tests pass only because gin.ShouldBindJSON ignores the header, so the header assertion path is not actually exercised

title: Dead/incorrect first request in TestGetBook
evidence: app_test.go:237-239 builds GET /books/<string(rune(id+'0'))> whose result is discarded and immediately overwritten by the real GET /books/1 at app_test.go:242-243
suggestion: Remove the discarded request or assert on it; string(rune(id+'0')) is a buggy int-to-string conversion

title: Low idiomatic score (0.4) despite passing build/lint
evidence: scores.json idiomatic=0.4; app.go duplicates the row-scan loop in ListBooks (app.go:131-138 vs 147-154) and repeats title/author validation verbatim in CreateBook and UpdateBook (app.go:82-89 vs 204-211)
suggestion: Extract a scanBooks(rows) helper and a validateBookReq(req) helper to reduce duplication
